NOTICE OF LODGING ADMINISTRATIVE RECORD (TRANSACTION ID # 60211636) FILED BY PETITIONER MASSEY, BUD H

LAW AND MOTION, 302, PETITIONER BUD MASSEY'S MOTION FOR PEREMPTORY WRIT OF MANDATE IS TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF THIS DATE. COURT VERBALLY ISSUES TENTATIVE RULING TO DENY THE MOTION. PETITIONER'S REQUEST FOR STATEMENT OF DECISION IS GRANTED. BOTH SIDES ARE DIRECTED TO SUBMIT VIA EMAIL A [PROPOSED] STATEMENT OF DECISION IN .DOC FORMAT TO CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: NEWTON LAM; CLERK: J. RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR NO. 8189, EMAIL: CKAREN@SFTC.ORG. (D302)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate
Off Calendar Jun-21-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Attorney, David P. Clisham and Justine L. Clishman of the law offices of Clisham & Sortor (415.291.0855) appear as counsel for petitioner/moving party

Deputy City Attorney, Rebecca Liu of the San Francisco City Attorney's Office (415.554.3870) appears as counsel for Respondent/opposing party

The cause is argued and submitted by both sides as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter.

PETITIONER BUD MASSEY'S Motion For Peremptory Writ Of Mandate is TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION as of this date. Court verbally issues tentative ruling to deny the motion. Petitioner's request for statement of decision is granted. Both sides are directed to submit via email a [proposed] statement of decision in .doc format to contestdept302tr@sftc.org.

Judge: Newton Lam; Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org. (D302)
